## Which section?

paste here

paste proposed version here

## Reason for the change

<!-- Why is this an improvement? Is the current content wrong, outdated, incomplete, or unclear? -->

- [ ] The command/flag is incorrect
- [ ] The command is outdated (please specify the new version)
- [ ] Important information is missing
- [ ] The explanation is unclear
- [ ] Other: ___
